# Crafted UI Component Library

> A package of reusable React components built to simplify the crafting of unique web applications. Open source, cleanly designed, and accessible.

## Overview

Crafted UI is a component library built with React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, and Base UI (headless accessible components from MUI). It can be installed via NPM or used as a starting point for your own component library. The library was designed to quickly build multiple web products with a consistent, evolving design system.

## Getting Started

- Installation: /docs/installation - How to install and set up Crafted UI
- Design Cues: /docs/design-cues - Design principles and patterns
- Color System: /docs/color-system - Semantic color system with primary, secondary, accent, destructive, and status colors
- Colors: /docs/colors - Available color palette
- Typography: /docs/typography - Typography system and text styles

## Components

### Layout Components
- Page: /docs/layout/page - Full page layout wrapper with optional navbar and sidebar
- Section: /docs/layout/section - Content section wrapper for organizing page content

### UI Components
- Alert: /docs/components/alert - Display important messages and notifications with color variants
- Avatar: /docs/components/avatar - Display user profile images with size variants
- Badge: /docs/components/badge - Display labels, statuses, and counts with color variants
- Breadcrumb: /docs/components/breadcrumb - Show hierarchical navigation path
- Button: /docs/components/button - Interactive button with full color palette (semantic, status, and base colors)
- Card: /docs/components/card - Container for related content with header, body, and footer
- Icon: /docs/components/icon - Reusable SVG icons for common UI elements and actions
- Metric: /docs/components/metric - Display key metrics and statistics with optional trends
- Pagination: /docs/components/pagination - Navigate through paginated data with customizable page ranges
- Sidebar: /docs/components/sidebar - Navigation sidebar component for page layouts
- Tablist: /docs/components/tablist - Tabbed interface component for organizing content
- Vertlist: /docs/components/vertlist - Vertical list component for displaying items

### Form Components
- Checkbox: /docs/forms/checkbox - Checkbox input with sizes, labels, and subtitle support
- Field: /docs/forms/field - Form input field wrapper with label and validation
- Fieldset: /docs/forms/fieldset - Group related form fields with optional title, subtitle, and grid layout
- Form: /docs/forms/form - Complete form component with validation support
- Input: /docs/forms/input - Single-line text input with support for various input types and insets
- Radio: /docs/forms/radio - Radio button input for selecting a single option from a group
- Select: /docs/forms/select - Dropdown select component for choosing from a list of options
- Textarea: /docs/forms/textarea - Multi-line text input for longer form content

## Available Components (Library)

The following components are exported from the Crafted UI library:

**Layout**: page, section

**UI Components**: alert, avatar, badge, breadcrumb, button, card, desclist (description list), empty, heading, icon, menu, metric, modal, pagination, tablist, vertlist

**Form Components**: checkbox, field, fieldset, form, input, radio, select, textarea

**Utility Components**: table

## Key Concepts

### Technology Stack
- **React 19** - Component library framework
- **TypeScript** - Type safety and developer experience
- **Tailwind CSS v4** - Utility-first styling
- **Base UI Components** - Headless accessible primitives from MUI
- **Vite** - Build tool and bundler
- **Storybook** - Component development and documentation

### Component Props Pattern
- Use `type` instead of `interface` for component props
- Extend base component props using intersection types (`&`)
- Always allow consumers to override styles via `className` prop

### Styling
- Use the `classNames` utility for combining class strings
- CSS custom properties defined in `vars.css` for theming
- Apply `className` last in the `classNames()` call for proper override behavior

### Theming
- Color tokens: background, foreground, primary, secondary, accent, destructive, muted, border, ring, card, popover
- Status colors: danger, warning, success, info
- Layout tokens: container sizes, navbar height, sidebar width, border radius

### Accessibility
- Built on Base UI Components for accessible primitives
- Keyboard navigation support
- Proper ARIA attributes
- Focus management
- Dark mode support through CSS custom properties

## Repository

GitHub: https://github.com/nmiller44/crafted-ui
